items.definition_en: Soil is the top layer of earth in a garden.
items.example_en: The soil in my garden is very soft.

items.definition_en: Dirt is the loose earth you find on the ground.
items.example_en: The flowers grow best in clean dirt.

items.definition_en: Earth is another word for soil in the garden.
items.example_en: The earth is dark and rich here.

items.definition_en: Mud is wet soil mixed with water.
items.example_en: After the rain, there is mud everywhere.

items.definition_en: Clay is heavy soil that sticks together when wet.
items.example_en: The clay in the garden is hard to dig.

items.definition_en: Sand is light soil made of tiny grains.
items.example_en: This plant grows well in sand.

items.definition_en: Loam is soil that is a mix of sand, clay and silt.
items.example_en: Loam is perfect for most garden plants.

items.definition_en: Topsoil is the upper layer of soil where plants grow.
items.example_en: We added new topsoil to the flower bed.

items.definition_en: Compost is decayed plant material used to feed soil.
items.example_en: I put compost on my garden every spring.

items.definition_en: Humus is dark, rich material made from rotting plants.
items.example_en: Humus makes the garden soil fertile.

items.definition_en: A worm is a small animal that lives in soil.
items.example_en: I saw a worm while digging in the garden.

items.definition_en: Manure is animal waste used to help plants grow.
items.example_en: Farmers often use manure to enrich their soil.

items.definition_en: A pebble is a small, smooth stone found in the soil.
items.example_en: There are pebbles all around the vegetable patch.

items.definition_en: A root is the part of a plant that grows in the soil.
items.example_en: The tree has strong roots in the ground.

items.definition_en: A stone is a hard, solid piece of mineral in the soil.
items.example_en: We found a big stone while digging.

items.definition_en: Silt is fine soil carried by water.
items.example_en: Silt makes the garden bed very soft.

items.definition_en: A bed is an area of soil for growing plants.
items.example_en: We planted new flowers in the garden bed.

items.definition_en: A patch is a small area of soil for plants.
items.example_en: There is a vegetable patch in the corner.

items.definition_en: Fertilizer is something you add to soil to help plants grow.
items.example_en: I use fertilizer to keep my roses healthy.

items.definition_en: Potting soil is special soil used for plants in pots.
items.example_en: She bought fresh potting soil for her flowers.
